message:
feat(gateway): Add jeffreysprompts (jfp) prompt library integration

- Add jfp.service.ts with CLI wrapper for browsing/searching prompts
- Add /api/prompts routes for list, search, suggest, category, featured
- Add jfp to utilities service registry for install detection
- Support caching, fallback search, and error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
